(For Division Use Only)
APPLICATION FOR EXCEPTION TO NO-FLARE RULE 19.15.18.12 (See Rule 19.15.18.12 NMAC and Rule 19.15.7.37 NMAC)
A. Applicant  $ \underline{\text{Yates Petroleum Corporation}} $
whose address is  $ \underline{\text{105 S. Fourth Street Artesia, NM 88210}} $ ___,
hereby requests an exception to Rule 19.15.18.12 for  $ \underline{90} $ days or until
$ \underline{\text{March 30}} $____, Yr  $ \underline{\text{2016}} $____, for the following described tank battery (or LACT):
Name of Lease ___ Perdomo BMP State Com #1H ___ Name of Pool ___ Bone Springs ___
Location of Battery: Unit Letter  $ \underline{\text{Section 24}} $ Township  $ \underline{\text{24S}} $ Range  $ \underline{\text{27E}} $
Number of wells producing into battery ___ API# 30-015-36499
B. Based upon oil production of  $ \underline{54} $_____ barrels per day, the estimated * volume of gas to be flared is  $ \underline{118 +/- daily} $ MCF; Value _____ per day.
C. Name and location of nearest gas gathering facility:
Agave
D. Distance  $ \underline{\hspace{2cm}} $ Estimated cost of connection  $ \underline{\hspace{2cm}} $
E. This exception is requested for the following reasons: ___
Requesting permission to flare due to abnormal system pressures in Agave lines. The possibility of flare will not be consistent, therefore, the volume above can easily fluctuate.
OPERATOR

I hereby certify that the rules and regulations of the Oil Conservation Division have been complied with and that the information given above is true and complete to the best of my knowledge and belief.
Signature
Printed Name
& Title  $ \underline{\text{Garrett Sanders-Production Analyst}} $

E-mail Address  $ \underline{\text{GSanders@yatespetroleum.com}} $
OIL CONSERVATION DIVISION
